_comment: Single source of truth for skill packs. The pack-builder reads these; build-packs.py emits one zip per pack into dashboard/packs/. A pack lists explicit `slugs` and/or a `category` folder that expands to every skill in it. A slug not yet in the library is skipped (logged), never an error.

packs.name: Wichita — Google Ads Workshop
packs.blurb: Paid-ads + measurement bundle for a local-service Google Ads workshop. Anchored on google-ads-analyzer.

packs.name: DealCon — Personal Brand
packs.blurb: The personal-brand / authority set for a deal-making audience — the live-slug version of the dealcon-10 pack.

packs.name: Website QA Audit
packs.blurb: The full website QA audit category — real, ship-ready.

packs.name: Digital Plumbing
packs.blurb: The foundational setup category (tracking, DNS, GBP, schema).
